body.title: UnseenUniversity Phase 3 ‚Äî Claude on the rack (inference + Claude device + YGM)
body.text:
# D-adc-phase-3-2026-04-27
**title:** UnseenUniversity Phase 3 ‚Äî Claude on the rack (inference + Claude device + YGM)
**date:** 2026-04-27
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-adc-inference-device, T-adc-inference-comms-unification-test, T-adc-claude-device-mcp-native, T-adc-ygm-nudge-pipeline, T-adc-ygm-end-to-end-test

## Decision narrative

Phase 3 closes the loop: inference device registers and validates comms:// unification (Igor‚ÜíClaude and Igor‚Üíinference are identical call patterns). Claude registers via MCP natively with CC.0 global + CC.N per-session mailboxes. YGM/Nudge pipeline ships with minimal footprint ‚Äî only two injectable tokens: 'ygm (N unread, from: [...])' and 'STOP'. Full message bodies stay in the mailbox; Claude reads explicitly. End-to-end test verifies send ‚Üí submit ‚Üí injection.

## Rollup

**Closed at:** 2026-04-27T22:48:18.364030+00:00
**Ticket count:** 5 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-adc-inference-device (M) ‚Äî UnseenUniversity: inference device ‚Äî comms:// unification validation target  `done` ‚Äî InferenceDevice + InferenceShim shipped; openrouter+ollama modes
- T-adc-claude-device-mcp-native (M) ‚Äî UnseenUniversity: Claude device ‚Äî MCP-native registration, CC.0 and CC.N mailboxes  `done` ‚Äî ClaudeDevice + ClaudeShim + ygm_check.py shipped; UserPromptSubmit hook + JSONL fallback
- T-adc-ygm-nudge-pipeline (L) ‚Äî UnseenUniversity: YGM/Nudge pipeline ‚Äî ygm and STOP injection only, minimal footprint  `done` ‚Äî ygm_check.py + ClaudeShim hook registration shipped; JSONL fallback during dual-write window
- T-adc-inference-comms-unification-test (S) ‚Äî UnseenUniversity: verify Igor‚ÜíClaude and Igor‚ÜíInference are identical comms:// call pattern  `done` ‚Äî comms:// unification validated ‚Äî identical call pattern for igor‚Üíinference and igor‚Üíclaude in contract tests
- T-adc-ygm-end-to-end-test (S) ‚Äî UnseenUniversity: YGM end-to-end test ‚Äî send to CC.0, submit query, confirm injection  `done` ‚Äî YGM end-to-end verified: ygm_check.py JSONL fallback returns nudge header when unread, exits 0 when empty/IMAP down

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
